title: Account Manager (Mandarin Speaking)
description:
We are seeking a bilingual Account Manager to join our dynamic Commercial team to service and manage existing client relationships, managing both English - and Mandarin - speaking clients. As an Account Manager, you are responsible for identifying new business opportunities, establishing, and managing sales deals, generating maximum revenue for the Company.

This role is ideal for a sales-driven professional with strong communication skills in both English and Mandarin, as you will be handling a diverse portfolio of clients.

Reporting to the Sales Director for Airport Advertising, you will contribute to and execute the strategy and activity of the Airport Sale team.


Job Description

  • Confidently sell JCDecaux - managed advertising spaces in Out-of Home communication.
  • Achieve and exceed sales targets set to you.
  • Establish close and trusted working relationships with new and existing clients to expand customer's base through cold calls, meetings and presentations.
  • Conduct sales presentations and pitches fluently in both English and Mandarin - This is essential as you will be managing both language - speaking clients.
  • Collaborate with internal teams and external stakeholders to ensure successful management and delivery of campaigns.
  • Provide best-in-class post-sales services to clients and agency partners.
  • Plan and build active sales pipeline to ensure success in achievement of KPIs.
  • Develop and maintain an in-depth understanding of the advertising marketplace, including regular analysis of competitor activity and identifying opportunities for creative concepts.
  • Be professional in carrying oneself and in performing all duties.

Requirements

  • Degree in Business, Business Management, Communications and Media or Digital Marketing.
  • Proficient in English and Mandarin Language.
  • Candidate must be able to converse fluently in Mandarin and to conduct sales presentations to serve Mandarin speaking clients.
  • Proficient in MS tools especially Powerpoint and Excel.

Desirable Criteria

  • Advertising or media-related work experience, Candidates without experience with an interest in media advertising sales and marketing are welcome to apply.
  • Results-oriented, motivated by performance rewards and incentives.
  • Strong customer-service mindset to manage the company's broad customer base of iconic and household brands, media agencies and specialists.
  • A good listener with an inquisitive mind to provide expert consults and best collaboration opportunities.
  • Excellent communicator both written and spoken.
  • Strong analytical and strategic thinking skills, able to analyze numbers and put forth actionable solutions.
  • Able to develop prospect lists and formulating sales strategies by actively reaching out to new clients.
  • Takes ownership of briefs received from clients, able to deliver proposals and negotiate well.
  • Enjoys and works well in a team, has a collaborative spirit to achieve a team sales target.

postedCompany.description:
At JCDecaux, you'll be part of the world's No. 1 outdoor advertising company. Employing more than 12,026 people globally, the Group is present in more than 80 different countries and generated revenues of more than €3,935M in 2024.
It all started in 1964, when our founder Jean-Claude Decaux had an idea that would change cities across the world - to provide and maintain bus shelters free of charge - paid for by the advertising posters displayed on them.

Today, JCDecaux Singapore reaches millions of people every day with our advertising products and services that enliven the cityscape and spark conversations. We enable iconic brands and household names to engage with their customers in a unique way whilst helping to shape the look and feel of the outdoor advertising landscape. Our talented people contribute across a wide range of roles; ensuring our clients are connecting with the right audience at Changi Airport, in premium shopping malls like ION Orchard, Jewel, Raffles City, in the cinemas and large format media spaces.

Since 2016, JCDecaux Singapore was awarded the Bizsafe star by the Workplace Safety and Health Council of Singapore, demonstrating our excellence in the WHS (Work Health and Safety) management system.  In 2019, we obtained ISO 45001 certificate which is an international standard for health and safety at work. Bizsafe Star Certification and ISO 45001 complement JCDecaux Group's Health & Safety Policy to ensure safer and healthier workplace practices not just for JCDecaux employees but our suppliers and partners too.

Voted by clients and agencies as the number one out-of-home media company 10th times over the past decade, we are inclusive, fair and family friendly. We believe that diversity of thought, experience and background provides the platform for great creativity. We value and support our people and believe our people make the difference.
postedCompany.name: JCDECAUX OUT OF HOME ADVERTISING PTE. LTD.
